text.title: Meta Audience Targeting (3-Tier) Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real ads-meta-targeting engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Core/Interest audience of 80k; CPM 3x benchmark; delivery throttled.
antipattern.root-cause: Author stacked too many AND filters.
antipattern.fix: Loosen to single broad interest; size 500K-2M.

antipattern.symptom: Acquisition campaign re-bills current customers; CPA up 40%; refund complaints.
antipattern.fix: Build purchaser/subscriber exclusions before any acquisition launch.

antipattern.symptom: LAL built from 200-person source; performs worse than interest targeting.
antipattern.fix: Wait for source ≥1000; or use Custom retargeting instead.
